steps.title: Identify the factoring task
steps.content: We need to find an equivalent expression by factoring $12x+27$. To find the equivalent form, we should factor out the greatest common factor (GCF) of the coefficients.

steps.title: Find the GCF and factor
steps.content:
The coefficients are 12 and 27. Since $12 = 3 \times 4$ and $27 = 3 \times 9$, their GCF is 3. Factoring out 3:
$$12x + 27 = 3(4x + 9)$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
